title: Brazilian Coconut Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegan dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine. This recipe combines tropical flavors with a crispy texture.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add tropical fruit and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly caramelized.
Add crisp rice and stir to combine with fruit.
Add brazilian spices, vegan vinegar, and salt. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the rice is coated with the spice mixture.
Stir in coconut milk and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Optional: add a side of steamed vegetables or a simple salad.
